mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INTERVIEW_SESSIONS ( SESSION_ID, MEMBER_ID, RESUME_CONTENT, JOB_CATEGORY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{sessionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeContent, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{jobCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO interview_sessions ( id, resume_id, category, question_count, status, started_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{resumeId}, #{category}, #{questionCount}, #{status}, #{startedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, resume_id AS resumeId, category, question_count AS questionCount, status, started_at AS startedAt, ended_at AS endedAt FROM interview_sessions WHERE id = #{sessionId}
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_sessions SET status = 'ended', ended_at = SYSDATE WHERE id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT DETAIL_ID, SESSION_ID, QUESTION_TEXT, USER_ANSWER, AI_EVALUATION, SCORE, SORT_ORDER FROM INTERVIEW_DETAILS WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
